qas.q: What does Part A of Medicare cover?
qas.a: . Part A covers inpatient care in skilled nursing facilities, critical access hospitals, and hospitals. Hospice and home health care are also covered by Part A.

qas.q: What does Part B of Medicare cover?
qas.a: . Part B covers outpatient care, doctor's services, physical or occupational therapists, and additional home health care

qas.q: What does Part C of Medicare cover?
qas.a: allows private health insurance companies to provide Medicare benefits

qas.q: What does Part D of Medicare cover?
qas.a: prescription drug coverage insurance

qas.q: What are the the 5 components of HIPAA?
qas.a:
1. Health Care Access, Portability & Renew-ability
2. Preventing Health Care Fraud & Abuse; Administrative Simplification, & Medical Liability Reform
3. Tax-Related Health Provisions
4. Application & Enforcement of Group Health Plan Requirements
5. Revenue Offsets
